creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Not finished testing this change yet, but I've slaved the conf ports to 
vanilla; a load simpler to maintain them then for you, as well as 
autogenning the plists (your plists are incorrect; they remove the 
customised config files!).  What do you think? 
http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/freeswitch-slave-confs.diff
